changelog: Polish 12.6 a11y fifth-pass: new css/a11y.css loaded globally via header.php — adds a token-based :focus-visible ring on every interactive element so keyboard users see where they are, .sr-only utility for screen-reader-only labels, .skip-link helper that surfaces on focus, prefers-reduced-motion respect for opt-in elements, and a focus boundary on [role="dialog"] for modal fallback paths. Default token contrast verified: --ui-text on --ui-surface = ~14.6:1 (AAA), --ui-text-muted on --ui-surface = ~4.86:1 (AA pass), --ui-text-muted on --ui-surface-muted = ~4.55:1 (AA pass).
